# harvester_virtualmachinetemplate (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_virtualmachinetemplate" "linux_server" {
  name      = "linux-server"
  namespace = "default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Optional

- `namespace` (String)

### Read-Only

- `default_version` (Number)
- `default_version_id` (String) Default version ID in the format namespace/name. Automatically set by Harvester when the first version is created.
- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `latest_version` (Number)
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
